mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO stock_namechange (ts_code, name, start_date, end_date, change_reason) VALUES
(#{item.tsCode}, #{item.name}, #{item.startDate}, #{item.endDate}, #{item.changeReason})
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM stock_namechange WHERE (ts_code, start_date) IN
(#{item.tsCode}, #{item.startDate})
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM stock_namechange WHERE end_date IS NOT NULL AND end_date != '' AND start_date > end_date

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM stock_namechange a WHERE EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM stock_namechange b WHERE b.ts_code = a.ts_code AND b.start_date < a.start_date AND (b.end_date IS NULL OR b.end_date = '' OR b.end_date > a.start_date) )
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM stock_namechange WHERE name IS NULL OR name = ''
